steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The first action—lowering the voting age—directly produces the second outcome—young people gaining voting opportunities. This is cause and effect.

steps.title: Match the transition to the relationship
steps.content:
”Consequently” signals that one event results from another, capturing the causal link. “Similarly” would pair parallel situations, “By contrast” would suggest contradiction, and “Nevertheless” would imply an unexpected turn—none reflect a straightforward cause-and-effect sequence.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
